Interface IDeviationInterval

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the classification methods that require a standard deviation based range.

[Guid("62144BE7-E05E-11D1-AAAE-00C04FA334B3")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDeviationInterval

Properties

DeviationInterval

The deviation interval (1/4 <= value <= 2).

double DeviationInterval { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Mean

The mean value.

double Mean { set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

StandardDev

The standard deviation.

double StandardDev { set; }

Property Value

double
